question:
Suppose that a die is rolled 120 times and the number of times each face comes
up is recorded. The following results are obtained:
$$
\begin{array}{l|l|l|l|l|l|l}
\hline \text { Face } & 1 & 2 & 3 & 4 & 5 & 6 \\
\hline \mathrm{n}_{\mathrm{i}} & 15 & 21 & 20 & 15 & 26 & 23 \\
\hline
\end{array}
$$
Test whether the die is fair at the 5% level of significance using the Chi-square
test.
